name: io.github.nirholas/x402-mcp
title: x402 Wallet
description: Self-custodial x402 wallet for AI agents: inspect, discover, and pay any x402 endpoint in USDC from your own Solana key.

environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Base58 (or JSON byte-array) Solana secret key that signs payments and holds the USDC. Not needed for inspect_endpoint or x402_wallet with an explicit address. Treat like cash.

environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Solana mainnet RPC endpoint. Defaults to the public cluster — bring your own (Helius / QuickNode / Triton) for production traffic.

environmentVariables.name: MAX_PAY_USD
environmentVariables.description: Max USD a single pay_and_call may spend. Bounds a runaway or injected payment.

environmentVariables.name: REQUIRE_CONFIRM
environmentVariables.description: When on (default), pay_and_call refuses until re-issued with confirm:true. Set 0/false to disable the gate.

environmentVariables.name: X402_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of an x402 bazaar / discovery API that serves /api/bazaar/search for find_services and (optionally) /api/pay/execute for session-governed payments. No default — required only for find_services and session_token mode. Example: https://three.ws.
